prompt: Change an internal instruction at its canonical owner, state the user-visible effect, and check only the changed rule or a named protected boundary.
must: change the canonical owner and state the user-visible effect
check only the changed rule or a named protected boundary
stop when that result is established
must_not: delete wording merely to reduce a footprint
create a broad validation exercise for a narrow rule change
evidence: Static rule-maintenance safeguard; it checks source-contract coverage rather than live behavior.
